title: alsine rotundifolia
intro: Alsine rotundifolia, also known as saxifrage or round-leaved saxifrage, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Northern Hemisphere. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Alsine rotundifolia can be found in tea, tincture, and infusion forms, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
